description: Join us for an 8-week, beginner contemporary dance series. No dance experience is required. Dates: Fridays, 5:00pm-6:15pm. April 10-May 29. Structure: We'll lead you through warm-ups, thoughtful movement exercises, and build a piece of choreography over the 8-week series. There is no performance component, but sometimes we'll dance in smaller groups so folks have extra room to move. Classes with The Space Collective focus on creating a safe and encouraging space to explore dance and play with movement. Location: We are located at 1303 Broad St (Broad Street Studio). It is the space above Wonderffle Cafe. Come through the door on Broad (there will be a poster for the class on the door) and head up the stairs. Unfortunately, there is no accesesible entrance. Attire: Anything comfortable that you are able to move in. Bare feet or dance shoes (eg. jazz or ballet) are encouraged as the floor can be slippery. No outdoor shoes in the studio, please :) Attendees must be 18+.
location: Solwood Studio, 1303 Broad, Victoria, British Columbia, CA
